name: vibe-wrap
description: Session wrap-up that reads the breadcrumb trail your toolkit already left — not a cold reconstruction. Multi-repo aware: surfaces what shipped across every repo the session touched, what's uncommitted, and what's unpushed, then gates commit + push on the current repo only (read wide, mutate narrow).
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version. Read by vibe-wrap-session-logger/vibe-wrap-friction-logger for the plugin_version audit field (path: .agent/agent.json). Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ and skills from .agent/skills/ — this file is a port-bookkeeping manifest, not a discovery requirement.
port.hooks: First hook-bearing port. Ships a SessionEnd nudge hook — Antigravity 2.0 supports the SessionEnd lifecycle event via the Gemini-CLI-derived JSON hook system (settings.json hooks block, command-type entry, stdin JSON payload with session_id/cwd/reason). Active wiring: .agent/hooks/settings.json (merge its hooks block into .gemini/settings.json). Script: .agent/hooks/session-end-nudge.py. Claude Code original .agent/hooks/hooks.json kept for provenance. The nudge is non-critical — /vibe-wrap works fully without it.
port.scripts: Deterministic core carried to .agent/scripts/ (render-wrap, multi-repo/git-state, readers, status, atomic-append, decision-log/ package, assets/, references/). Logger + plant helpers stay under .agent/skills/vibe-wrap-<skill>/scripts/.
port.eponymous_router: The source `wrap` skill IS the main /vibe-wrap command — ported to the bare router .agent/workflows/vibe-wrap.md (not /vibe-wrap-wrap).
